productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Greek Beige Sandal
description: A classic sandal for the woman of style, this pair from carlton london is a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team this with knee length skirts or shorts for that cool look.Upper Synthetic leather upper with metallic embellishments, straps, flowers and panels covering the forefoot, midfoot and ankle region for maximum style and comfort Padded ankle wrap for comfort Staps and panels for ample ventilation to the feet Lace-ups for ankle wrap to lock the foot in place Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned footbed for ample comfort when walking Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Horizontal grooves on forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction Kitten heel for style shoe careWipe surface using clean, dry cloth to remove dust
